description: Sector overlay for agricultural producers, processors, exporters, importers, food-chain participants, and agribusiness documentation in the United States.

metadata.scope: United States-only sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official U.S. federal regulatory sources and widely used U.S. model/professional sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State-specific requirements may apply.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: FDA Food Safety Modernization Act materials

rules.title: APHIS animal/plant health permit or quarantine evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for APHIS permits, quarantine, animal health, plant health, import/export, or pest/disease controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: FSMA preventive controls or produce-safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FSMA, preventive controls, produce safety, food-safety plan, or hazard-analysis language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Agricultural product traceability or sanitary transport evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for lot tracing, product traceability, sanitary transportation, or supply-chain verification language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FDA FSMA food traceability and sanitary transport rules

rules.title: Pesticide, chemical-use, or environmental control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for pesticide, chemical application, environmental, runoff, waste, or EPA-related controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Organic certification or labeling evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for organic certification, certified organic, NOP, or organic handling/labeling evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
